references.title: Educational data mining: prediction of students' academic performance using machine learning algorithms

extracted.Preprocessing Details: Grades are discretized into 4 different categories.
extracted.Models: Naive Bayes, Random Forest, SVM, MLP, Logistic Regression, kNN
extracted.Performance Metric: Best Model: {AUC: 0.860 - RF, Accuracy: 0.746 - RF & MLP, F1-Score: 0.723 - MLP, Precision: 0.752 - RF, Recall: 0.746 - RF & MLP}
extracted.Comments:
Authors create a comparison of predictive models. 

Authors do not perform any form of validation.
extracted.Limitations:
- No validation

- Does only consider Midterm exams.

- Small dataset

annotations.text:
The goal of the paper is to create a predictive model that is able to predict final exam scores taking into consideration midterm exams.

Authors compare the performance of multiple different algorithms, SVM, RF, kNN, NB, etc… Sample includes data from a Turkish Language Course in the Fall of 2019/2020. Proposed model achievef 70 to 75% accuracy.
